parts: Solenopsis longiflora is a species of fire ant, and as such, there is limited information available on its medicinal properties. However, fire ants have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues. In general, fire ants are believed to have antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The leaves, roots, and flowers of plants like Solenopsis longiflora are often used in herbal remedies, but specific medicinal parts of this species are not well-documented. Further research is needed to determine the specific medicinal properties and uses of Solenopsis longiflora.
